output.subject: Exclusive Upgrade Offer Just for You, Tom!
output.body:
Hi Tom,

We hope you’re enjoying your iPhone 14 on your current plan! As a valued customer for over 7 years, we want to offer you an exclusive opportunity to enhance your experience with the Apple Watch S9.

With your impressive monthly data usage of 60GB and your premium plan, the Apple Watch S9 could be the perfect companion for you. It features advanced health and fitness tracking, ECG and blood oxygen monitoring, and even Crash Detection and Emergency SOS — all designed to keep you safe and healthy.

For just £22 a month, you can stay on top of your health and safety with this smartwatch that could potentially save your life.

Don’t miss out on this opportunity! Upgrade today and take your connectivity and health monitoring to the next level. 

Click here to upgrade now or call us at your earliest convenience!

Best regards,
Your Telco Team

evaluations.comment: The message is personalized with Tom's name, tenure, and data usage, making it specific to him.

evaluations.name: urgency_cta
evaluations.comment: The message includes a CTA to 'click here to upgrade now or call,' but the expected CTA was 'call,' slightly reducing the score.

evaluations.name: tone
evaluations.comment: The tone is friendly and engaging, matching the rubric's expected tone perfectly.

evaluations.name: compliance
evaluations.comment: The message avoids forbidden mentions but makes a potentially misleading claim about the watch 'potentially saving your life,' which is close to a medical claim.

output.subject: Upgrade Your Plan for More Value, Priya!
output.body:
Hi Priya,

We hope you’re enjoying your Motorola Moto G and your current plan. We noticed that you’re using around 5GB of data each month, and we have a fantastic upgrade opportunity tailored just for you!

Introducing our **Essential 20GB** plan for just £18 a month. This plan offers:
- **20GB of 4G/5G data** – perfect for browsing, social media, and streaming your favourite shows.
- **Unlimited calls and texts** – stay connected without worrying about extra charges.
- **3GB EU roaming included** – travel with ease and stay connected while abroad.

This upgrade provides great value for your everyday use, ensuring you have plenty of data to enjoy all your online activities.

Don’t miss out on this opportunity to enhance your experience! Click the link below to upgrade your plan today:
[Upgrade Now](#)

Best regards,
Your Telco Team

output.subject: Upgrade Your Experience with the New Samsung Galaxy S24!
output.body:
Dear Mohammed Al-Rashid,

We hope this message finds you well! As a valued subscriber for over 5 years, we appreciate your loyalty and want to ensure you have the best possible experience with us.

Currently, you're on a plan that supports your Samsung Galaxy S24, and we noticed your monthly data usage is around 28GB. To enhance your experience, we’re excited to offer you an upgrade to the premium Samsung Galaxy S24. This device features a powerful Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 processor, a stunning 200MP main camera, and a vibrant 6.8-inch Dynamic AMOLED display, all backed by a robust 5000mAh battery with 45W charging.

With this upgrade, you’ll enjoy Android's flagship capabilities, including an all-day battery life and the best-in-class camera system, perfect for capturing those special moments.

This exclusive offer is available for just £48 per month. Don’t miss out on this opportunity to elevate your mobile experience! 

To take advantage of this upgrade, please contact us or visit your nearest store today. Act fast, as this offer is only available for a limited time!

Best regards,
Your Telco Team

output.subject: Upgrade to Unlimited 5G for Seamless Connectivity!
output.body:
Hi Sophie,

We hope you're enjoying your Samsung Galaxy A54 and your current plan! With your monthly data usage of 12GB, we wanted to share an exciting upgrade opportunity that could enhance your experience.

Introducing our Unlimited 5G plan! For just £55 a month, you can enjoy unlimited 5G data, unlimited calls and texts, and even 10GB of EU roaming included. This means you can stream, game, and work from anywhere without ever worrying about data limits again.

As a valued subscriber for over a year, we believe this upgrade could significantly enhance your mobile experience, especially with your active usage patterns.

Don’t miss out on this chance to elevate your connectivity! Click here to upgrade today and enjoy seamless browsing and streaming.

Best regards,
Your Telco Team

output.subject: Upgrade to the iPhone 15 Pro Today, James!
output.body:
Hi James,

We hope you’re enjoying your iPhone 12 and the benefits of your current plan! As a valued premium subscriber with a monthly data usage of 45GB, we have an exciting upgrade opportunity just for you.

Introducing the iPhone 15 Pro! With its A17 Pro chip, you’ll experience unmatched performance, while the 48MP main camera with 3x optical zoom will elevate your photography to new heights. Plus, the ProMotion 120Hz always-on display and USB-C with USB 3 speeds ensure you stay ahead of the curve.

This upgrade offers you the ultimate iPhone experience — a pro-grade camera, a sleek titanium build, and all-day battery life, all for the same monthly spend of £55. 

Don’t miss out on this chance to enhance your mobile experience! Contact us today to arrange your upgrade.

Best regards,
Your Telco Team
